etymology.description: дҫҶ(дҫҶ) (lГЎi, "come") + гҗӯ (wooden tablet) = controlling flow/resources -> stingy
etymology.interpretation: The character е—Ү(sГЁ, "stingy") combines дҫҶ(дҫҶ) (lГЎi, "come") with гҗӯ (a wooden tablet) to depict the act of controlling or managing incoming resources very tightly. The imagery of managing resources by controlling their movement relates to the cautious and controlled use associated with stinginess.
etymology.simplification: е—Ү(е—Ү) was simplified to е•¬(е•¬) through a reduction in components while keeping the essential understanding of managing resources tight, by adopting a simpler structure that still conveys tight control.
